title: Fluffy Chicken Pilaf
description: A comforting and easy-to-make pilaf dish with fluffy chicken and a touch of buttery goodness.
instructions: Cook the fluffy according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of melted buttery over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the uncooked pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Stir in the cooked fluffy and melted buttery. Serve hot.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the pilaf is heated through and the top is lightly browned.
